zh.lifeSummary: 當John, Ian Ciar MacLeod 4th. Clan Chief於1330年出生在英國蘇格蘭音巴內-爾斯凱時，他的父親Malcolm MacLeod 3rd Clan Chief34歲，母親Lady Dorothea Marjorie Campbell20歲。他於1355年之前與Annie O'Neil在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾登維根結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1392年在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾羅德爾享年62歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾易納。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John, Ian Ciar MacLeod 4th. Clan Chief于1330年出生在英国苏格兰音巴內-爾斯凱时，他的父亲Malcolm MacLeod 3rd Clan Chief34岁，母亲Lady Dorothea Marjorie Campbell20岁。他于1355年之前与Annie O'Neil在苏格兰音巴內-爾登維根结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1392年在苏格兰音巴內-爾羅德爾享年62岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾易納。

nameMeanings.name: MacLeod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLeod
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Leòid ‘son of Leòd’, a patronymic from a Gaelic form of Old Norse Liótr ‘ugly’, a common personal name in medieval Norway and Iceland.

History: This is the name of a major Scottish Hebridean clan, associated in particular with Dunvegan on the isle of Skye; also, historically, with the island of Lewis. There are two main branches: the McLeods of Harris and Dunvegan (Sìol Tormoid) and the McLeods of Lewis (Sìol Torcaill). Both branches claim descent from a certain Leòd (Norse: Liótr), who lived in the 13th century. — One prominent bearer of this prominent Scottish name, Alexander McLeod (1774–1833), a Reformed Presbyterian clergyman, author, and editor, emigrated to the US in 1792 from the island of Mull in the Hebrides.

nameMeanings.name: John,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

meanings: Modern Irish coinage, created as a feminine form of   Ciarán  , and now in vogue elsewhere in the English-speaking world.

meanings: Recently coined feminine form of   Kieran ;   see also  Ciara .

variants.name: Kiarah
meanings: Modern Irish coinage, created as a feminine form of   Ciarán  , and now in vogue elsewhere in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When John, Ian Ciar MacLeod 4th. Clan Chief was born in 1330, in Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Malcolm MacLeod 3rd Clan Chief, was 34 and his mother, Lady Dorothea Marjorie Campbell, was 20. He married Annie O'Neil before 1355, in Dunvegan, Inverness-shire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1392, in Rodel, Inverness-shire, Scotland, at the age of 62, and was buried in Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John, Ian Ciar MacLeod 4th. Clan Chief est né en 1330, à Skye, Inverness-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Malcolm MacLeod 3rd Clan Chief, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Lady Dorothea Marjorie Campbell, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Annie O'Neil avant 1355, à Dunvegan, Inverness-shire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1392, à Rodel, Inverness-shire, Écosse, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Iona, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als John, Ian Ciar MacLeod 4th. Clan Chief 1330 in Skye, Inverness-shire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Malcolm MacLeod 3rd Clan Chief 34 und seine Mutter Lady Dorothea Marjorie Campbell 20. Er hat vor 1355 in Dunvegan, Inverness-shire, Scotland Annie O'Neil geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1392 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Rodel, Inverness-shire, Scotland und wurde in Iona, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John, Ian Ciar MacLeod 4th. Clan Chief è nato il nel 1330 nel Skye, Inverness-shire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Malcolm MacLeod 3rd Clan Chief, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Lady Dorothea Marjorie Campbell, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Annie O'Neil prima del 1355, nel Dunvegan, Inverness-shire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1392, nel Rodel, Inverness-shire, Scotland, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: John, Ian Ciar MacLeod 4th. Clan Chiefが1330年にイギリススコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアスクイで生まれた時，父Malcolm MacLeod 3rd Clan Chiefは34歳，母Lady Dorothea Marjorie Campbellは20歳であった。1355年以前にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアダンベガンでAnnie O'Neilと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1392年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアロデルで62歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルアイオナにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John, Ian Ciar MacLeod 4th. Clan Chief(이)가 1330년 영국 스코틀랜드 인버네스-실르 스카이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Malcolm MacLeod 3rd Clan Chief(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Dorothea Marjorie Campbell(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1355년 이전 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 던베건에서 Annie O'Neil(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1392년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 로데에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 이오나에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John, Ian Ciar MacLeod 4th. Clan Chief nasceu em 1330, em Skye, Inverness-shire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Malcolm MacLeod 3rd Clan Chief, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Lady Dorothea Marjorie Campbell, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Annie O'Neil antes 1355, em Dunvegan, Inverness-shire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1392, em Rodel, Inverness-shire, Scotland, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John, Ian Ciar MacLeod 4th. Clan Chief родился в 1330 г. в местности ски, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Malcolm MacLeod 3rd Clan Chief было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Dorothea Marjorie Campbell, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Annie O'Neil перед 1355 г. в местности дунвеган, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1392 г. в местности родель, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности иона, аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John, Ian Ciar MacLeod 4th. Clan Chief nació en 1330, en Skye, Inverness-shire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Malcolm MacLeod 3rd Clan Chief, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Lady Dorothea Marjorie Campbell, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Annie O'Neil antes de 1355, en Dunvegan, Inverness-shire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1392, en Rodel, Inverness-shire, Scotland, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Iona, Argyll, Scotland.
